_comment: License to accepted countries mapping. Uses ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes. 'ALL' means all non-sanctioned countries. 'EU' means EU/EEA member states.

_notes.MGA: Malta Gaming Authority - covers EU/EEA broadly. Individual casinos may block locally-regulated markets (SE, UK, DE, DK, BE, NL) but many still accept them.
_notes.UKGC: UK Gambling Commission - UK primarily. UK players also play at MGA/Curacao casinos.
_notes.Spelinspektionen: Swedish Gambling Authority - Sweden only. But Swedes play at MGA/Curacao/Estonian casinos too.
_notes.Estonian: Estonian license - Estonia, Finland primarily. EU mutual recognition means broader EU acceptance.
_notes.Curacao: Curacao eGaming - accepts virtually all non-sanctioned countries except US/Israel typically.
_notes.Anjouan: Anjouan (Comoros) - same as Curacao, very permissive.
_notes.USA_State: US state-specific license - that state only via geo-location.

MGA.notes: MGA casinos vary widely. Some block SE/UK/DE/DK/BE/NL due to local licensing, many don't. Default to broad availability.

UKGC.notes: UKGC license is UK-only. UK players also play MGA/Curacao.

Spelinspektionen.notes: Swedish license is Sweden-only. But Swedes play everywhere.

Estonian.notes: Estonian license = EU valid. Most Estonian casinos target FI/EE but accept broader EU.

Curacao.notes: Curacao = broad international. Many block major regulated markets (US, UK, EU big-5, AU) but accept rest of world. Individual casino policy varies massively.

Anjouan.notes: Same as Curacao - very permissive, blocks vary by casino.

Kahnawake.notes: Canada-focused. Some accept US players (gray area).

USA_State.notes: Geo-fenced to specific US state. Physical location verified.

country_overrides._comment: Specific country behaviors that override license defaults

US.notes: Most non-US-licensed casinos block US due to UIGEA. Exceptions: some Curacao/Kahnawake accept US. US state-licensed = state only.

IL.notes: Israel commonly blocked by most offshore casinos.

AU.notes: Australia has strict IGA. Most offshore casinos block AU.

SE.notes: Sweden has local license but Swedes play at MGA/Curacao/Estonian casinos widely.

UK.notes: UK has UKGC but UK players play MGA/Curacao too.

DE.notes: Germany has GGL but many MGA casinos still accept Germans.
